title: Killer Bunny Name Tag
description: Naming a rabbit "The Killer Bunny" will turn it into a killer bunny
body:
![killer bunny name tag datapack/mod title image minecraft](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/titles/killer_bunny_name_tag.png)
[![jodeks datapacks discord](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Discord.png)](https://discord.gg/z2n3qTzQY6)   [![datapacks jodek youtube](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/YouTube.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@jodek)   [![killer bunny name tag minecraft datapack github issues](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Issues.png)](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/killer-bunny-name-tag/issues)   [![jodeks datapacks kofi](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/Kofi.png)](https://ko-fi.com/jodek)   [![github sponsor jodek](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/jodeks-datapacks/Assets@main/badges/GH_Sponsor.png)](https://github.com/sponsors/Jodekq)
**Naming a rabbit "The Killer Bunny" will turn it into a killer bunny** _To make a killer bunny normal again, rename them with another name tag_ Killer bunnies are hostile towards players and wolves ![Killer Bunny Minecraft the killer bunny fabric modrinth mod killer bunnie](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/killer_bunny_1.gif?raw=true) ![Killer Bunny Minecraft the killer bunny fabric modrinth mod killer bunnie](https://github.com/jodeks-datapacks/Assets/blob/main/gifs/killer_bunny_2.gif?raw=true)
